notes.category_policy: 4 fixed categories: 0=生物名・分類群名; 1=研究手法・技術; 2=学問分野名; 3=その他の研究キーワード
notes.classification_policy: Classification was manually re-evaluated by the keyword's primary role in the supplied research context: taxa/common organism groups→0; analytical, experimental, measurement, modeling, software, telemetry, robotic, and intervention terms→1; established academic fields/interdisciplinary domains→2; behaviors, biological mechanisms, anatomical/physiological states, concepts, contexts, and application terms→3.
notes.deduplication_policy: Keyword order follows first appearance after normalization. Direct translation/orthographic duplicates were normalized in favor of Japanese or more standard Japanese labels: アニマルウェルフェア→動物福祉, 古典的条件づけ→古典的条件付け, 母仔関係→母子関係, 鳥→鳥類. English labels were retained when no Japanese duplicate was supplied in the source list.
notes.split_policy: The bundled item 集団現象・臨界現象・コントラリアン was split into three keywords. Terms where the middle dot is part of the term, such as 化学・光遺伝学, were retained as a single keyword.
notes.layout_policy: Coordinates were regenerated from curated semantic anchors inside each fixed class, not from language-distance embedding. Subregions separate organismal taxonomy, image/tracking methods, computational modeling, molecular/chemical methods, telemetry/sensing, engineering/robotics, ecology/behavioral fields, neuro/psych fields, social behavior, foraging/mating/defense, sensory/neural/cognitive terms, development/physiology/genetics, parent-offspring terms, locomotion/biomechanics, and context/application terms.
notes.update_summary: 344 unique keywords were retained after normalization from 475 normalized mentions across 132 non-empty supplied lines. Cluster counts and mention totals were recalculated.
